themes.name: Valentine's Day 💕
themes.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 25% 15%, rgba(100, 0, 40, 0.55) 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 75% 85%, rgba(80, 0, 35, 0.45) 0%, transparent 45%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%, rgba(60, 5, 25, 0.30) 0%, transparent 65%), linear-gradient(160deg, #0e0308 0%, #160510 30%, #1c0712 55%, #130409 80%, #0a0206 100%)

themes.name: New Year 🎆

themes.name: Rainy Day 🌧️
